title: Louisiana Story
writer: Frances H. Flaherty, Robert J. Flaherty
actors: Joseph Boudreaux, Lionel Le Blanc, E. Bienvenu
plot: The idyllic life of a young Cajun boy and his pet raccoon is disrupted when the tranquility of the bayou is broken by an oil well drilling near his home.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 4 wins & 3 nominations total
